col4: A traditional 4-D Theater housed in what was once the park's Playdium Arcade building. It features various 4-D movies, sometimes themed to certain events taking place at the park. Due to COVID-19, the theater has been closed since 2020.
An interactive dark ride in which riders can use ghost blasters to defeat various creatures throughout the ride.

col2: Herbert Paul Schmeck of the Philadelphia Toboggan Company
col4: A walk-through dark attraction. This ride, the last operating of its kind in the world, was remodeled in 1996.

This is the oldest ride at Kennywood, originally constructed in 1901. It has gone through numerous major theme and structural changes throughout its existence. Various names have accompanied the different themes over the years, including the Panama Canal, Tour Around the World, Hardheaded Harold's Horrendously Humorous Haunted Hideaway, and Garfield's Nightmare.
